attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY                    ,
MT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE                   ,
MT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE            ,
MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
MT.SALES_REP_NUMBER                        ,
MT.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                         ,
MT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                    ,
MT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT                   ,
MT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID                         ,
MT.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG                  ,
MT.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                      ,
MT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                       ,
MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT           ,
MT.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG                       ,
MT.DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT                        ,
MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                          ,
MT.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM                   ,
MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD                   ,
MT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG              ,
MT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                 ,
MT.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT                 ,
MT.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT           ,
MT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                        ,
MT.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT          ,
MT.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY                       ,
MT.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG                  ,
MT.RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT         ,
MT.RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT          ,
MT.RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY                 ,
MT.RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT             ,
MT.RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT              ,
MT.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG                     ,
MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                         ,
MT.SERVICE_FLG                             ,
MT.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY                        ,
MT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                    ,
MT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT             ,
MT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT            ,
MT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT                       ,
MT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                    ,
MT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY              ,
MT.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG                       ,
MT.RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT        ,
CASE WHEN MT.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PUBLISH_FLG ,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER           ,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER			  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME                
FROM
(
SELECT
GOODS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY               ,
GOODS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE              ,
GOODS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE       ,
GOODS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                ,
GOODS.SALES_REP_NUMBER                   ,
GOODS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                    ,
GOODS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT              ,
GOODS.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID                    ,
GOODS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG             ,
GOODS.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                 ,
GOODS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                  ,
GOODS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      ,
GOODS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG                  ,
CAST (1 AS DECIMAL(28,16)) AS DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT   ,
GOODS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                     ,
GOODS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM              ,
GOODS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD              ,
GOODS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG         ,
GOODS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY            ,
GOODS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT            ,
CAST (0 AS INTEGER) AS DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT ,
GOODS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                   ,
GOODS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT     ,
GOODS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
GOODS.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG             ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT     ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY) AS RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY                ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT) AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT        ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT) AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT          ,
GOODS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG                ,
GOODS.SALES_ORDER_KEY                    ,
GOODS.SERVICE_FLG                        ,
GOODS.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY                   ,
GOODS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT        ,
GOODS.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT       ,
GOODS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT                  ,
GOODS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY         ,
GOODS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG                  ,
SUM(GOODS.RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,GOODS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,GOODS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,GOODS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RS_GOODS_INCR GOODS
WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY 
GOODS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY               ,
GOODS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE              ,
GOODS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE       ,
GOODS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                ,
GOODS.SALES_REP_NUMBER                   ,
GOODS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                    ,
GOODS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT              ,
GOODS.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID                    ,
GOODS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG             ,
GOODS.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                 ,
GOODS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                  ,
GOODS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      ,
GOODS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG                  ,
GOODS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                     ,
GOODS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM              ,
GOODS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD              ,
GOODS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG         ,
GOODS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY            ,
GOODS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT            ,
GOODS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                   ,
GOODS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT     ,
GOODS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
GOODS.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG             ,
GOODS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG                ,
GOODS.SALES_ORDER_KEY                    ,
GOODS.SERVICE_FLG                        ,
GOODS.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY                   ,
GOODS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT        ,
GOODS.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT       ,
GOODS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT                  ,
GOODS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
GOODS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY         ,
GOODS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG 
,GOODS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,GOODS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,GOODS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME       

UNION ALL

SELECT                                   
SERVICES.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY            ,
SERVICES.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE           ,
SERVICES.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    ,
SERVICES.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY             ,
SERVICES.SALES_REP_NUMBER                ,
SERVICES.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                 ,
SERVICES.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT           ,
SERVICES.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID                 ,
SERVICES.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
SERVICES.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY              ,
SERVICES.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD               ,
SERVICES.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
SERVICES.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG               ,
SUM(SERVICES.DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT,
SERVICES.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
SERVICES.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM           ,
SERVICES.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD           ,
SERVICES.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG      ,
SERVICES.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         ,
SERVICES.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT         ,
SERVICES.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT   ,
SERVICES.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                ,
SERVICES.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  ,
SERVICES.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY               ,
SERVICES.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG          ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY) AS RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY         ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT) AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT     ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT) AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT      ,
SERVICES.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG             ,
SERVICES.SALES_ORDER_KEY                 ,
SERVICES.SERVICE_FLG                     ,
SERVICES.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY                ,
SERVICES.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT     ,
SERVICES.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT    ,
SERVICES.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SERVICES.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY      ,
SERVICES.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG               ,
SUM(SERVICES.RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,SERVICES.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,SERVICES.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,SERVICES.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME     
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RS_SERVICES_INCR SERVICES
WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY 
SERVICES.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY            ,
SERVICES.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE           ,
SERVICES.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    ,
SERVICES.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY             ,
SERVICES.SALES_REP_NUMBER                ,
SERVICES.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                 ,
SERVICES.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT           ,
SERVICES.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID                 ,
SERVICES.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
SERVICES.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY              ,
SERVICES.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD               ,
SERVICES.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
SERVICES.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG               ,
SERVICES.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
SERVICES.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM           ,
SERVICES.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD           ,
SERVICES.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG      ,
SERVICES.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         ,
SERVICES.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT         ,
SERVICES.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT   ,
SERVICES.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                ,
SERVICES.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  ,
SERVICES.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY               ,
SERVICES.RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG          ,
SERVICES.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG             ,
SERVICES.SALES_ORDER_KEY                 ,
SERVICES.SERVICE_FLG                     ,
SERVICES.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY                ,
SERVICES.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT     ,
SERVICES.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT    ,
SERVICES.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SERVICES.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY            ,
SERVICES.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY      ,
SERVICES.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,SERVICES.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,SERVICES.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,SERVICES.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME 
) MT
